rules.rule_text:
title: Hidden Arguments in Shortcut
id: 7f20cccc-0572-4243-a193-a5f37a90c0b0
description: There is a vulnerability in Windows Explorer in which invisible space
  characters can lead to command line arguments being hidden from the "Target" text
  box of a shortcut.
references:
- https://www.trendmicro.com/en_us/research/25/c/windows-shortcut-zero-day-exploit.html
status: test
author: Ramine Etow, Patrik Olson
date: 2025-03-19
logsource:
  product: windows
  category: process_creation
detection:
  selection:
    parent_image|endswith: \explorer.exe
    command|re: '[\x09\x0a\x0b\x0c\x0d]|[\s]{15,}'
  filter_onenote:
    image|endswith: \onenotem.exe
    command|re: \tsr
  condition: selection and not 1 of filter_*
falsepositives:
- Unknown
level: medium
